Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Tamsin
Tag.zhCN: 塔姆辛

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Summon an Imp Familiar. Deathrattle: Go Dormant for 2 turns.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：召唤一个小鬼魔仆。亡语：休眠2回合。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Felfire Thrusters
Tag.zhCN: 邪火推进器

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Spellburst: Deal this minion's Attack damage to 2 random enemy minions. Starship Piece
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：对2个随机敌方随从各造成等同于本随从攻击力的伤害。 星舰组件

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: The coolness factor of a fire decal is universal.
Tag.zhCN: 全宇宙都流行鬼火车贴。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Guiding Figure
Tag.zhCN: 引航舰首像

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Spellburst: Trigger a random friendly minion's Deathrattle. Starship Piece
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：触发一个随机友方随从的亡语。 星舰组件

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Nearrrr, farrrr, whereeeeeeever you are
Tag.zhCN: 无……论……你离我多么遥远……

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Eldritch Being
Tag.zhCN: 怪异奇物

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Outcast and Spellburst: Shuffle your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 流放，法术迸发：洗混你的手牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Tor flud huth respa di blarry? Fleebletor glomdor!
Tag.zhCN: 歪比歪比？歪比巴卜！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: K'ara, the Dark Star
Tag.zhCN: 卡拉，黑暗之星

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Spellburst: Steal 2 Health from a random enemy. (Shadow spells don't remove this Spellburst.)
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：随机从一个敌人处偷取2点生命值。（暗影法术不会移除此法术迸发。）

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Velen had never seen a shooting star in real life, so when the opportunity arose…
Tag.zhCN: 此前维伦从未在现实生活中亲眼看到过流星，于是当机会来临的时候……

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Arkwing Pilot
Tag.zhCN: 阿肯飞翼驾驶员

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: At the end of your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy. Spellburst: Summon an Arkwing Pilot.
Tag.zhCN: 在你的回合结束时，随机对一个敌人造成3点伤害。 法术迸发：召唤一个阿肯飞翼驾驶员。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Delivered in under 30 minutes, or your Arkwings are free!
Tag.zhCN: 阿肯尼特烤机，承诺30分钟内送达，否则免单！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: The Galaxy's Lens
Tag.zhCN: 星系投影

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Absorb the spell's power!@Cast {0}.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：吸收法术的能量！@施放{0}。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Nexus-Prince Shaffar
Tag.zhCN: 节点亲王沙法尔

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Spellburst: Give a minion in your hand +3/+3 and this Spellburst (unless it already has these effects).
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：使你手牌中的一张随从牌获得+3/+3和此法术迸发效果（除非其已经拥有这些效果）。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Whatever you do, do not give him OR his ethereal parrot a magical lamp.
Tag.zhCN: 无论如何，神灯绝对不能落在他手里。让他的虚灵鹦鹉抢到也不行。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN
Tag.enUS: Earnable after opening a Great Dark Beyond card pack.
Tag.zhCN: 打开深暗领域卡牌包后可解锁。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.enUS: Earnable after purchasing the Great Dark Beyond Tavern Pass.
Tag.zhCN: 购买深暗领域炉石通行证后开放解锁。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Hostile Invader
Tag.zhCN: 凶恶的入侵者

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Battlecry, Spellburst, and Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to all other minions.
Tag.zhCN: 战吼，法术迸发， 亡语：对所有其他随从造成2点伤害。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "And my Axe!" "And my Axe!" "And my Axe!"
Tag.zhCN: “还有我的斧头！”“还有我的斧头！”“还有我的斧头！”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Ethereal Oracle
Tag.zhCN: 虚灵神谕者

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spell Damage +1 Spellburst: Draw 2 spells.
Tag.zhCN: 法术伤害+1 法术迸发：抽两张法术牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: I see 2 spells in my future.
Tag.zhCN: 我看到了未来——两张法术牌。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Deep Space Curator
Tag.zhCN: 深空策展人

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Get a random minion of the spell's Cost. Set its Cost to (0).
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：随机获取一张法力值消耗与法术相同的随从牌，并将其法力值消耗变为（0）点。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: *Gestures to empty room* "...and here is my curated collection of space."
Tag.zhCN: *指向空荡荡的房间*“……这就是我的太空藏品。”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Lightfused Manasaber
Tag.zhCN: 光注魔刃豹

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Rush Spellburst: Gain Divine Shield.
Tag.zhCN: 突袭。法术迸发：获得圣盾。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Oh no, I ran out of fused Mana!
Tag.zhCN: 糟糕，我灌注的魔力用光了！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Ur'zul Rager
Tag.zhCN: 乌祖尔暴怒者

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Lifesteal Spellburst: Attack a random enemy minion.
Tag.zhCN: 吸血 法术迸发：随机攻击一个敌方随从。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: The Burning Legion is host to many horrors, but a 3 Mana 5/1 is the worst of all!
Tag.zhCN: 燃烧军团里有不少可怕的恐魔，其中3费5/1的是最可怕的！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Bolide Behemoth
Tag.zhCN: 流彩巨岩

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Battlecry: Your Asteroids deal 1 more damage this game. Spellburst: Shuffle 3 of them into your deck.
Tag.zhCN: 战吼：在本局对战中，你的小行星造成的伤害增加1点。法术迸发：将3张小行星洗入你的牌库。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: There's only so many words that exist for rocks in space.
Tag.zhCN: 用来表示太空中的岩石的词快不够用了。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: K'ure, the Light Beyond
Tag.zhCN: 克乌雷，圣光领域

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Spellburst: Summon a random 3-Cost minion. (Holy spells don't remove this Spellburst.)
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发： 随机召唤一个法力值 消耗为（3）的随从。 （神圣法术不会移除此法术迸发。）

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: The Draenei's story of survival should instill hope in you that anything is possible!! As long as you have the aid of an interdimensional manifestation of holy energy.
Tag.zhCN: 德莱尼救亡图存的故事非常励志。一切皆有可能——前提是要有跨维度的神圣能源帮助。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Overzealous Healer
Tag.zhCN: 狂热的医者

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deathrattle: Restore #6 Health to the enemy hero. Spellburst: Silence this minion.
Tag.zhCN: 亡语：为敌方英雄恢复#6点生命值。法术迸发：沉默本随从。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: In another universe, she's Genji's best friend.
Tag.zhCN: 在另一个宇宙里，她是源氏最好的朋友。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Troubled Mechanic
Tag.zhCN: 困窘的机械师

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Divine Shield Spellburst: Draw a Draenei.
Tag.zhCN: 圣盾。法术迸发：抽一张德莱尼牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: In space, no one can hear you talk about your troubles.
Tag.zhCN: 在太空中，没人能听到你诉苦。

Entity.Tag: L. Lullabi & I. Campelo da Silva

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Interstellar Researcher
Tag.zhCN: 星际研究员

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Battlecry and Spellburst: Draw a Libram.
Tag.zhCN: 战吼，法术迸发：抽一张圣契牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "If only I could read Draenei!"
Tag.zhCN: “要是我会德莱尼语就好了！”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Parallax Cannon
Tag.zhCN: 视差光枪

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Has +2 Attack if you've Discovered this turn. Spellburst: Your hero is Immune this turn.
Tag.zhCN: 如果你在本回合中 发现过，则拥有+2攻击力。法术迸发：在本回合中，你的英雄免疫。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Math is now cannon in the Warcraft universe.
Tag.zhCN: 在魔兽宇宙中，数学变成了武器。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Star Grazer
Tag.zhCN: 吞星兽

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Elusive, Taunt Spellburst: Give your hero +8 Attack this turn and gain 8 Armor.
Tag.zhCN: 扰魔。嘲讽 法术迸发：使你的英雄获得本回合中的+8攻击力，并获得8点护甲值。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Star gazing and star grazing aren't too different. Except for the part where you eat stars.
Tag.zhCN: 观星和吞星没什么区别。一个是收入目中，一个是收入腹中。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Starscale Constellar
Tag.zhCN: 辰鳞星圣

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Double this minion's Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：本随从的攻击力翻倍。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: You'll understand how to best make use of its effect once you connect the dots.
Tag.zhCN: 把这些点连起来，你自会懂得这张牌的妙处。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.enUS: Earnable on the Great Dark Beyond Reward Track.
Tag.zhCN: 可以在深暗领域奖励路线中获得该奖励。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Eredar Skulker
Tag.zhCN: 艾瑞达潜藏者

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Combo and Spellburst: Gain +2 Attack and Stealth.
Tag.zhCN: 连击，法术迸发：获得+2攻击力和潜行。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "And I'll do it again, too!"
Tag.zhCN: “我还能再潜一次！”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Droplet of Insanity
Tag.zhCN: 狂乱液滴

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Add two Corrupt cards to your hand, then Corrupt them.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：将两张腐蚀牌置入你的手牌，并将其腐蚀。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Imagine what a whole bucket could do.
Tag.zhCN: 想想整桶装的狂乱会是什么样。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Headmaster Kel'Thuzad
Tag.zhCN: 校长克尔苏加德

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Embercaster
Tag.zhCN: 灰烬施法者

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Add 3 copies of the spell to your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：将法术牌的三张复制置入你的手牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Sometimes all it takes is the right spark of inspiration.
Tag.zhCN: 有时只要一点灵感的火花，就能收获一堆法术的灰烬。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Cabal Acolyte
Tag.zhCN: 秘教侍僧

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Taunt Spellburst: Gain control of a random enemy minion with 2 or less Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 嘲讽，法术迸发：随机获得一个攻击力小于或等于2的敌方随从的控制权。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: How did he get to the top of his class? He pulled a few strings!
Tag.zhCN: 为何他能在班级中名列前茅？全靠牵线搭桥掌握了控制权！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: High Abbess Alura
Tag.zhCN: 高阶修士奥露拉

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Cast a spell from your deck (targets this if possible).
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：从你的牌库中施放一张法术牌（尽可能以本随从为目标）。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: She's all about hitting the books. Literally.
Tag.zhCN: 法术书对她来说很有吸引力。字面意义的吸引力。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Speaker Gidra
Tag.zhCN: 演讲者吉德拉

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Rush, Windfury Spellburst: Gain Attack and Health equal to the spell's Cost.
Tag.zhCN: 突袭，风怒 法术迸发：获得等同于法术法力值消耗的攻击力和生命值。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: If a teacher lectures in a forest, does she even make a sound?
Tag.zhCN: 如果一个讲师在森林中发表了一次无人倾听的演讲，那么实际上她是否发出了声音？

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Headmaster Kel'Thuzad
Tag.zhCN: 校长克尔苏加德

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: If the spell destroys any minions, summon them.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：如果法术消灭了任意随从，召唤被消灭的随从。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "You wish to know my secrets, hmm? I carry little bits of tuna in the sleeves of my robe, he loves that. Oh, you meant the risen dead? That was trivial, trivial."
Tag.zhCN: “你想知道我的秘密，嗯？我在长袍的袖子里藏了一点金枪鱼，他最喜欢那个了。哦，你说那些复活的死者？那只是小事，小事。”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Onyx Magescribe
Tag.zhCN: 黑岩法术抄写员

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Add 2 random spells from your class to_your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：随机将两张你职业的法术牌置入你的手牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Sometimes you gotta spend spells to earn spells.
Tag.zhCN: 舍不得法术，套不着法术。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Intrepid Initiate
Tag.zhCN: 新生刺头

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Gain +2_Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：获得+2攻击力。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: How you like them apples?
Tag.zhCN: 你还想有好果子吃？

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Crimson Hothead
Tag.zhCN: 赤红急先锋

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Gain +1 Attack and Taunt.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：获得+1攻击力和嘲讽。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Has a real passion for spelling.
Tag.zhCN: 对法术是真的热爱。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Shifty Sophomore
Tag.zhCN: 调皮的大二学妹

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Stealth Spellburst: Add a Combo card to your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 潜行，法术迸发：将一张连击牌置入你的手牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Experienced enough to do crimes, inexperienced enough to be super obvious about it.
Tag.zhCN: 稍有资历便调皮，资历尚浅露形迹。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Diligent Notetaker
Tag.zhCN: 笔记能手

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Return the spell to your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：将法术牌移回你的手牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: You never know what cards are going to be on the test.
Tag.zhCN: 你永远想不到考试会考哪张牌。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Reaper's Scythe
Tag.zhCN: 收割之镰

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Spellburst: Also damages adjacent minions this turn.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：在本回合中同时对攻击目标相邻的随从造成伤害。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Die. Die. Die.
Tag.zhCN: 死吧，死吧，死吧。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Krolusk Barkstripper
Tag.zhCN: 裂树三叶虫

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Destroy a random enemy minion.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：随机消灭一个敌方随从。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: My friend went krolusk tipping once… once!
Tag.zhCN: 有一次我的朋友闲得去给三叶虫翻身……就再也没回来！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Firebrand
Tag.zhCN: 火印火妖

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Deal 4 damage randomly split among all_enemy minions.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：造成4点伤害，随机分配到所有敌方随从身上。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Too cool for school, too hot for thought.
Tag.zhCN: 你好烧啊。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Gibberling
Tag.zhCN: 聒噪怪

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Summon a Gibberling.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：召唤一个聒噪怪。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "As a Linguistics student I have studied the Gibberlings. I have determined they are speaking Gibberish."
Tag.zhCN: “作为语言学专业的学生，我对聒噪怪颇有研究。我确信，它们说的话就是——怪话。”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Wyrm Weaver
Tag.zhCN: 浮龙培养师

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Summon two 1/3 Mana Wyrms.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：召唤两条1/3的法力浮龙。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Studied basket weaving as an undergrad.
Tag.zhCN: 浮夸的学长最终留校；萨莉去了加基森当警员；我去永歌森林培养浮龙：我们都有光明的前途。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Pen Flinger
Tag.zhCN: 甩笔侏儒

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Battlecry: Deal 1 damage to a minion. Spellburst: Return this to_your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 战吼：对一个随从造成1点伤害。法术迸发：将本随从移回你的 手牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: The pen is also a more aerodynamic short-range projectile than the sword.
Tag.zhCN: 笔确实胜于长剑，特别是在短距离投射打击时的空气动力学性能方面。

Tag.name: TARGETING_ARROW_TEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal 1 damage.
Tag.zhCN: 造成1点伤害。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Wretched Tutor
Tag.zhCN: 失心辅导员

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Deal 2 damage to all other minions.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：对所有其他随从造成2点伤害。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "If you like my tutoring, you'll love my sister the art therapist, my father the driver, and my mother the housekeeper."
Tag.zhCN: “要是你喜欢我的辅导，那你也一定会喜欢我那当美术老师的妹妹，当司机的父亲，还有当管家的母亲。”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Ceremonial Maul
Tag.zhCN: 仪式重槌

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Summon a Student with Taunt and stats equal to the spell's Cost.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：召唤一个属性值等同于法术法力值消耗的并具有嘲讽的学生。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: For the most discerning of hall monitors.
Tag.zhCN: 专为纪律委员设计。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Goody Two-Shields
Tag.zhCN: 双盾优等生

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Divine Shield Spellburst: Gain Divine Shield.
Tag.zhCN: 圣盾，法术迸发：获得圣盾。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: These are my shields. There are at least two like them, and both are mine.
Tag.zhCN: 考试当天带上一根油条和两块盾，你也能成为优等生。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Forest Warden Omu
Tag.zhCN: 林地守护者欧穆

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Refresh your Mana Crystals.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：复原你的法力水晶。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: She wishes all things could grow and flourish at Scholomance. If only she knew…
Tag.zhCN: 她许愿所有的生命都能在通灵学园破土而出，永葆生机。要是她知道后来……

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Jaina Proudmoore
Tag.zhCN: 吉安娜·普罗德摩尔

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Summon a 3/6 Water Elemental. Deathrattle: Shuffle into your deck.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：召唤一个3/6的水元素。亡语：洗入你的牌库。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Spirit of Kel'Thuzad
Tag.zhCN: 克尔苏加德的灵魂

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: If the spell destroys any minions, summon them.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：如果法术消灭了任意随从，召唤被消灭的随从。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Gelbin Mekkatorque
Tag.zhCN: 格尔宾·梅卡托克

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Summon an AWESOME invention. Deathrattle: Go Dormant for 4 turns.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：召唤一项惊人的发明。亡语：休眠4回合。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Broll Bearmantle
Tag.zhCN: 布罗尔·熊皮

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Transform into a 3/6 Bear with Rush. Deathrattle: Go Dormant for 2 turns.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：变形成为一只3/6并具有突袭的熊。亡语：休眠2回合。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Jaina Proudmoore
Tag.zhCN: 吉安娜·普罗德摩尔

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Summon a 3/6 Water Elemental. Deathrattle: Shuffle into your deck.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：召唤一个3/6的水元素。亡语：洗入你的牌库。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Rehgar Earthfury
Tag.zhCN: 雷加尔·大地之怒

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Summon a random Totem.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：随机召唤一个图腾。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Drek'Thar
Tag.zhCN: 德雷克塔尔

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Summon a random Elemental. Deathrattle: Shuffle_this into_your_deck.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：随机召唤一个元素。亡语：洗入你的牌库。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Gibberling
Tag.zhCN: 聒噪怪

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Summon a Gibberling.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：召唤一个聒噪怪。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "As a Linguistics student I have studied the Gibberlings. I have determined they are speaking Gibberish."
Tag.zhCN: “作为语言学专业的学生，我对聒噪怪颇有研究。我确信，它们说的话就是——怪话。”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Priestess Tyrande
Tag.zhCN: 祭司泰兰德

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Restore 2 Health to all friendly characters. Deathrattle: Go Dormant for 2 turns.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：为所有友方角色恢复2点生命值。亡语：休眠2回合。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Cho'gall
Tag.zhCN: 古加尔

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Spellburst: The next spell you cast this turn costs Health instead of Mana. Deathrattle: Go Dormant for 2 turns.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：在本回合中，你施放的下一个法术不再消耗法力值，转而消耗生命值。亡语：休眠2回合。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Even after all this time, Gul'dan still makes Cho'gall go get donuts and coffee.
Tag.zhCN: 即便这么多年过去了，古尔丹还是会吩咐古加尔去准备咖啡和甜甜圈。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Stormreaver Warlock
Tag.zhCN: 暴掠术士

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Add a copy of the spell to your hand. It costs (0).
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：将法术牌的一张复制置入你的手牌，其法力值消耗为（0）点。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Akama
Tag.zhCN: 阿卡玛

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Permanently Stealthed. Spellburst: Deal 3 damage to the enemy hero. Deathrattle: Go Dormant for 3 turns.
Tag.zhCN: 永久潜行。法术迸发：对敌方英雄造成3点伤害。亡语：休眠3回合。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Dredgin'
Tag.zhCN: 正在探底

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Add a Dredge spell to your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：将一张探底法术牌置入你的手牌。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Quick Fix
Tag.zhCN: 快速维修

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Throw a better random weapon to your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：随机将一把更好的武器掷入你的手中。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Quick Fix
Tag.zhCN: 快速维修

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Throw a random weapon to your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：随机将一把武器掷入你的手中。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Sinking Hopes
Tag.zhCN: 沉没的希望

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Dredge for your opponent. If it's a spell, increase its Cost to 10.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：为你的对手探底。如果选中的是法术牌，则将其法力值消耗增加到10点。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Swapping!
Tag.zhCN: 正在调换

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Add a Swap spell to your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：将一张调换法术牌置入你的手牌。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Swapping!
Tag.zhCN: 正在调换

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Add a Swap spell to your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：将一张调换法术牌置入你的手牌。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Swapping!
Tag.zhCN: 正在调换

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Add a Swap spell to your hand.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：将一张调换法术牌置入你的手牌。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Infinite Amalgam
Tag.zhCN: 永恒融合怪

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Inspire, Frenzy, Spellburst, Honorable Kill, and Overkill: Summon a random 1-Cost minion.
Tag.zhCN: 激励，暴怒，法术迸发，荣誉消灭，超杀：随机召唤一个法力值消耗为（1）的随从。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: The Infinite Amalgam sought Gammy, the greatest among them, though it feared the queen of the amalgams would never be found.
Tag.zhCN: 永恒融合怪找上了它们之中最强大的盖米。虽然它有点担心融合怪女王永远也不会出现。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Imprisoned Celestial
Tag.zhCN: 被禁锢的星骓

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Dormant for 2 turns. Spellburst: Give your minions Divine Shield.
Tag.zhCN: 休眠2回合。法术迸发：使你的随从获得圣盾。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "Look at your deck, now back to me, now back at your deck, now back to me. Who am I? None of your—I'm on a horse."
Tag.zhCN: 此马非凡马，星骓本是星。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Keywarden Ivory
Tag.zhCN: 钥匙守护者艾芙瑞

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Battlecry: Discover a Dual Class spell from any class. Spellburst: Get another copy.
Tag.zhCN: 战吼：发现一张任意职业的双职业法术牌。法术迸发：获取发现的法术牌的另一张复制。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: She learned exactly one thing from her old man: copying.
Tag.zhCN: 她从她父亲那里只学到一件事：复制。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.enUS: Glacier Racer
Tag.zhCN: 冰川竞速者

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Spellburst: Deal 3 damage to all Frozen enemies.
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：对所有已被冻结的敌人造成3点伤害。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: It’s just not the same without a super suit.
Tag.zhCN: 没了超人战服，终究是差点味道。
